description: Composition Black capris for women made of 92% polyester and 8% spandex, with broad elasticated waistband, Dri-Fit technology, turquoise blue panels on the sides, stitch detailing, a zipped pocket at the back below the waistband, mesh panels above the hem at the back and printed nike swoosh embroidered on the left leg Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach iron or dry clean Line dry Stylish to a T, these polyester/spandex capris from nike are engineered with Dri-Fit technology and designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out on your runs. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike performance t-shirts and running shoes for that smart, sporty look.
